privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated data. Setup scripts construct a barebones .odt file describing the fictional 'Riverside Industrial Historic District' directly injecting the exact headers (Sections 7-10), subsections ('Architectural Development', etc.), and keywords claimed in the metadata. The target boundary map image is downloaded from Wikimedia or generated via a Python PIL fallback.
